summary: Very good, clearer recording that improves on earlier sources; no specific comments on the musical performance.
review: The reviewer rates the audio as “very good,” noting a substantial improvement over previous audience recordings. No remarks are made about the band's playing, setlist flow, or individual members, so the musical quality cannot be assessed from this review.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one positive review focusing on sound quality; no information on performance, so overall rating is weighted toward the good recording but remains modest.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and noticeably better than earlier audience sources; no reported drop‑outs or muffiness.
